name: Columbia University in the City of New York
meets_full_need_notes: Columbia meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students. Families earning under $150,000 typically pay no more than 10% of income; under $60,000 pay nothing.
no_loan_notes: Columbia eliminated loans from all financial aid packages in 2018. All aid is grant-based. No loans in Columbia financial aid packages; students may take outside loans separately.
ed_aid_implications: Columbia's financial aid is need-blind and identical for ED and RD applicants. Aid package released with ED decision. Binding commitment is expected but can be reconsidered if aid is insufficient.
appeal_policy: Columbia considers appeals for changed financial circumstances. Students submit Professional Judgment requests to Student Financial Services.
